dashboard.label: TIBER/DORA Bank Purple Team - Caldera Testauswertung
dashboard.description: Uebersicht aller Caldera-Testcases, MITRE ATT&CK Mapping, Artefakte und SIEM-UseCase-Trigger fuer mittelstaendische Bank. Stand 2025/2026.

search.query: index=caldera sourcetype="caldera:command:enriched" | stats dc(operation_name) as testcases
index=caldera sourcetype="caldera:command:enriched" | stats count as total_artifacts
index=siem_summary sourcetype="siem:usecase:triggered" | stats dc(usecase_id) as triggered_usecases
index=siem_summary sourcetype="siem:usecase:killchain" | stats count as killchains
index=caldera sourcetype="caldera:command:enriched" | stats dc(technique_id) as techniques

panel.title: Testcases mit MITRE ATT&CK und SIEM-UseCase Zuordnung

search.query: index=caldera sourcetype="caldera:command:enriched" | lookup mitre_attack_bank_mapping technique_id OUTPUT technique_name tactic severity bank_relevance siem_usecase_id siem_usecase_name dora_article tiber_phase description_de | stats count as artefakt_count values(technique_id) as mitre_techniques values(technique_name) as mitre_technique_names values(tactic) as mitre_tactics values(siem_usecase_id) as siem_usecases values(siem_usecase_name) as siem_usecase_names values(severity) as max_severity values(dora_article) as dora_referenz values(tiber_phase) as tiber_phasen by operation_name | join type=left operation_name [search index=siem_summary sourcetype="siem:usecase:triggered" | stats dc(usecase_id) as triggered_count values(usecase_id) as triggered_usecases by operation_name] | eval siem_triggered=if(isnotnull(triggered_count), triggered_count, 0) | eval detection_rate=round(siem_triggered/mvcount(siem_usecases)*100, 1)."%" | eval status=case(siem_triggered=0, "KEINE ERKENNUNG", siem_triggered<mvcount(siem_usecases), "TEILWEISE ERKANNT", siem_triggered>=mvcount(siem_usecases), "VOLLSTAENDIG ERKANNT") | sort - artefakt_count | table operation_name artefakt_count mitre_techniques mitre_tactics siem_usecases siem_usecase_names siem_triggered detection_rate status dora_referenz tiber_phasen max_severity | rename operation_name as "Testcase/Operation" artefakt_count as "Artefakte" mitre_techniques as "MITRE Technique IDs" mitre_tactics as "MITRE Tactics" siem_usecases as "Zugeordnete SIEM UseCases" siem_usecase_names as "UseCase Namen" siem_triggered as "UseCases getriggert" detection_rate as "Erkennungsrate" status as "Erkennungsstatus" dora_referenz as "DORA Referenz" tiber_phasen as "TIBER Phase" max_severity as "Schweregrad"

index=caldera sourcetype="caldera:command:enriched" | lookup mitre_attack_bank_mapping technique_id OUTPUT tactic severity | stats count as events dc(technique_id) as techniques by tactic | sort - events | eval tactic_order=case( tactic="discovery",1, tactic="credential-access",2, tactic="execution",3, tactic="persistence",4, tactic="privilege-escalation",5, tactic="defense-evasion",6, tactic="lateral-movement",7, tactic="collection",8, tactic="exfiltration",9, tactic="command-and-control",10, tactic="impact",11, 1=1, 99) | sort tactic_order | table tactic events techniques

| inputlookup mitre_attack_bank_mapping.csv | stats dc(technique_id) as mapped_techniques values(severity) as severities by siem_usecase_id siem_usecase_name | join type=left siem_usecase_id [search index=siem_summary sourcetype="siem:usecase:triggered" | stats count as trigger_count latest(_time) as last_triggered by usecase_id | rename usecase_id as siem_usecase_id] | eval trigger_count=if(isnotnull(trigger_count), trigger_count, 0) | eval last_triggered=if(isnotnull(last_triggered), strftime(last_triggered, "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M"), "Nie") | eval status=if(trigger_count>0, "AKTIV", "INAKTIV") | sort siem_usecase_id | table siem_usecase_id siem_usecase_name mapped_techniques trigger_count last_triggered status severities | rename siem_usecase_id as "UseCase ID" siem_usecase_name as "UseCase Name" mapped_techniques as "MITRE Techniken" trigger_count as "Trigger-Anzahl" last_triggered as "Letzter Trigger" status as "Status" severities as "Schweregrad"

panel.title: Artefakte je Testcase - Detail mit SIEM-UseCase-Match

search.query: index=caldera sourcetype="caldera:command:enriched" | lookup mitre_attack_bank_mapping technique_id OUTPUT technique_name tactic severity siem_usecase_id siem_usecase_name description_de | eval artifact_type=case( match(command_decoded, "(?i)(mimikatz|procdump|lsass|sekurlsa|credential|password|ntds)"), "Credential Artifact", match(command_decoded, "(?i)(net\s+use|psexec|winrm|ssh|wmic|smbclient|mount)"), "Lateral Movement Artifact", match(command_decoded, "(?i)(reg\s+query|reg\s+add|schtasks|cron|service|persist)"), "Persistence Artifact", match(command_decoded, "(?i)(compress|archive|zip|tar|7z|rar|staging|exfil|curl|ftp|upload)"), "Exfiltration Artifact", match(command_decoded, "(?i)(defender|disable|bypass|inject|hollowing|evasion|wevtutil|clear-eventlog)"), "Evasion Artifact", match(command_decoded, "(?i)(whoami|ipconfig|ifconfig|netstat|arp|nslookup|net\s+user|systeminfo|tasklist)"), "Discovery Artifact", match(command_decoded, "(?i)(encrypt|ransom|shutdown|kill|stop-service|del\s+/|rm\s+-rf)"), "Impact Artifact", match(command_decoded, "(?i)(screen|clipboard|keylog|capture|record)"), "Collection Artifact", 1=1, "Other Artifact") | eval siem_match=if(isnotnull(siem_usecase_id), "JA: ".siem_usecase_id." - ".siem_usecase_name, "KEIN MATCH") | sort _time | table _time operation_name ability_name technique_id technique_name tactic artifact_type command_decoded siem_match severity description_de | rename _time as "Zeitstempel" operation_name as "Testcase" ability_name as "Ability" technique_id as "MITRE ID" technique_name as "MITRE Technique" tactic as "Taktik" artifact_type as "Artefakt-Typ" command_decoded as "Ausgefuehrter Befehl" siem_match as "SIEM UseCase Match" severity as "Schweregrad" description_de as "Beschreibung"

panel.title: Kill Chain Timeline - Angriffsphasen ueber Zeit

search.query: index=caldera sourcetype="caldera:command:enriched" | lookup mitre_attack_bank_mapping technique_id OUTPUT tactic severity | eval kill_chain_phase=case( tactic="discovery" OR tactic="reconnaissance", "1-Reconnaissance", tactic="credential-access", "2-Credential Access", tactic="privilege-escalation", "3-Privilege Escalation", tactic="defense-evasion", "4-Defense Evasion", tactic="lateral-movement", "5-Lateral Movement", tactic="execution", "6-Execution", tactic="persistence", "7-Persistence", tactic="collection", "8-Collection", tactic="exfiltration" OR tactic="command-and-control", "9-Exfiltration/C2", tactic="impact", "10-Impact", 1=1, "99-Unknown") | timechart span=5m count by kill_chain_phase

index=caldera sourcetype="caldera:command:enriched" | lookup mitre_attack_bank_mapping technique_id OUTPUT tactic severity siem_usecase_id | eval profile=case( match(operation_name, "(?i)ransomware"), "TIBER-Bank-Ransomware", match(operation_name, "(?i)apt|espionage"), "TIBER-Bank-APT-Espionage", match(operation_name, "(?i)insider"), "TIBER-Bank-Insider-Threat", match(operation_name, "(?i)lateral"), "TIBER-Bank-Lateral-Movement", match(operation_name, "(?i)evasion|defense"), "TIBER-Bank-Defense-Evasion", match(operation_name, "(?i)exfil"), "TIBER-Bank-Data-Exfiltration", 1=1, operation_name) | stats count as total_commands dc(technique_id) as unique_techniques dc(tactic) as tactics_covered dc(siem_usecase_id) as usecases_matched values(tactic) as all_tactics latest(_time) as last_run by profile | eval last_run=strftime(last_run, "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M") | sort - total_commands | table profile total_commands unique_techniques tactics_covered usecases_matched all_tactics last_run | rename profile as "Adversary-Profil" total_commands as "Befehle" unique_techniques as "MITRE Techniken" tactics_covered as "Taktiken" usecases_matched as "SIEM Matches" all_tactics as "Abgedeckte Taktiken" last_run as "Letzter Lauf"

| inputlookup mitre_attack_bank_mapping.csv | stats dc(technique_id) as techniques values(siem_usecase_id) as usecases by dora_article tiber_phase | join type=left dora_article [search index=caldera sourcetype="caldera:command:enriched" | lookup mitre_attack_bank_mapping technique_id OUTPUT dora_article | stats dc(technique_id) as tested_techniques count as test_events by dora_article] | eval tested_techniques=if(isnotnull(tested_techniques), tested_techniques, 0) | eval test_events=if(isnotnull(test_events), test_events, 0) | eval coverage=round(tested_techniques/techniques*100, 1)."%" | eval status=case(tested_techniques=0, "NICHT GETESTET", tested_techniques<techniques, "TEILWEISE", tested_techniques>=techniques, "VOLLSTAENDIG") | table dora_article tiber_phase techniques tested_techniques coverage test_events status | rename dora_article as "DORA Artikel" tiber_phase as "TIBER Phase" techniques as "Definierte Techniken" tested_techniques as "Getestete Techniken" coverage as "Abdeckung" test_events as "Test-Events" status as "Status"

index=caldera sourcetype="caldera:command:enriched" | lookup mitre_attack_bank_mapping technique_id OUTPUT technique_name tactic severity siem_usecase_id siem_usecase_name | search NOT [search index=siem_summary sourcetype="siem:usecase:triggered" | stats count by technique_id | fields technique_id] | stats count as undetected_events values(ability_name) as abilities by technique_id technique_name tactic severity | where isnotnull(technique_id) | sort - severity undetected_events | table technique_id technique_name tactic severity undetected_events abilities | rename technique_id as "MITRE ID" technique_name as "Technik" tactic as "Taktik" severity as "Schweregrad" undetected_events as "Unerkannte Events" abilities as "Betroffene Abilities"
index=siem_summary sourcetype="siem:usecase:triggered" | timechart span=10m count by usecase_id

index=caldera sourcetype="caldera:agent" | spath | stats latest(trusted) as trusted latest(last_seen) as last_seen values(platform) as platform values(host) as hostname by paw | eval status=if(trusted="true", "ONLINE", "OFFLINE") | eval last_seen=strftime(strptime(last_seen, "%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ"), "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M") | table paw hostname platform status last_seen | rename paw as "Agent ID" hostname as "Hostname" platform as "Plattform" status as "Status" last_seen as "Zuletzt gesehen"
index=caldera sourcetype="caldera:command:enriched" | lookup mitre_attack_bank_mapping technique_id OUTPUT severity | stats count by severity | sort - count
